prompt: Convert the molecule from iupac to graph: N-[[4-cyano-2-(trifluoromethyl)phenyl]methyl]-2,7-diazaspiro[3.5]nonane-2-carboxamide
response_contract: Return only a valid JSON object in MolJSON format. No markdown, no code fences, no comments, no surrounding prose. Use the MolJSON keys atoms, bonds, charges, and aromatic_n_h.
